scope: formal revision of infeasible preregistered steps under the actual workspace constraints

revised_steps.reason: No runnable public AAPB implementation was available in the workspace, and a heuristic reconstruction would not be faithful.
The available SCG repository was a project-page template, and no runnable MaskDiffusion SD1.5 code was available in the workspace.
External human annotators are required and unavailable in this coding-only run.
Independent human double-annotation is required and unavailable in this coding-only run.
The actual run used the available Python 3.12 / torch 2.10 stack, recorded explicitly in the manifest and lock artifact.

implication: This attempt remains an exploratory feasibility study rather than a confirmatory preregistered test.
